title: Bridge Essay: Loving-kindness and compassion meditation: potential for psychological intervent

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Formless/Absorption** (Phase 8) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Formless/Absorption to mechanistic neuroscience.

**Loving-kindness and compassion meditation: potential for psychological interventions.** — Clin Psychol Rev. PMID: 21840289. DOI: 10.1016/j.cpr.2011.07.003. Mindfulness-based meditation interventions have become increasingly popular in contemporary psychology. Other closely related meditation practices include loving-kindness meditation (LKM) and compassion meditation (CM), exercises oriented toward enhancing unconditional, positive emotional states of kindness and compassion.
